data.name: Furry Star Command – Hentai Jigsaw
data.detailed_description:
The galaxy hides mysteries, dangers…
and an irresistible crew waiting for you.

In Furry Star Command – Hentai Jigsaw, the universe comes alive with fur, curves, and a dazzling variety of exotic furry women from multiple species. Assemble 30 exclusive high-resolution illustrations featuring starship officers, engineers, pilots, alien hybrids, and powerful intergalactic hotties — each with her own futuristic charm and unique sensuality.

Every puzzle reveals a new beauty of the Furry Fleet:
intense eyes, tight uniforms, striking bodies, and poses that blend commanding presence, alien allure, and the fiery touch of a deep-space fantasy.

It’s the perfect experience for anyone who wants to relax… and get lost in the galaxy’s softest temptations. 😈✨🪐

⭐ Key Features

🧩 Three difficulty levels — 81, 196, or 361 pieces, so you can solve at your own pace.

📸 30 exclusive images of sensual furry girls: wolves, foxes, felines, bunnies, dragons, alien hybrids and more, each with unique sci-fi personality and design.

💫 Real variety of bodies, fur colors, patterns, styles, and species — from disciplined officers to radiant exotic aliens.

🚀 Download your favorites and build your own personal gallery of interstellar beauties.

🏆 Unlockable achievements — every completed puzzle gives you that sweet “mission accomplished” feeling.

🎶 Relaxing space-ambient soundtrack, perfect for drifting between stars and nebulae.

🌟 Elegant and intuitive interface, designed for a sensual, cozy, and immersive puzzle experience.

⭐ Discover a galaxy filled with charm, mystery…
and temptations you’ll only find beyond the stars.

Furry Star Command – Hentai Jigsaw: where every piece uncovers a new interstellar pleasure. 💫😉🦊

data.short_description: Travel through distant sectors while assembling sensual jigsaw puzzles of furry officers, alien hybrids, and interstellar beauties — all featured in 30 exclusive artworks blending futuristic charm, voluptuous bodies, and that forbidden spark only the cosmos can ignite.🚀💗🦊
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 丹麥文*, 芬蘭文*, 荷蘭文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 羅馬尼亞文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
